chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.539 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 07.05.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Faqeer Hussain of PS Site-B, Karachi Complainant present ------------------------------ Complainant has appeared and rely on learned A.P.G. This is a date by Court matter. Applicant and his counsel are called absent, without intimation. Deliberate absence of applicant as well as his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue the instant criminal bail application. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
